description_long: This is a fictional starfighter with a sleek, elongated fuselage and four prominent wings arranged in an X-shape, each equipped with a cylindrical engine nacelle and laser cannon at the tip. The body is primarily white with red and gray markings, and the wings feature black and red accents. The cockpit is located near the front of the fuselage, covered by a transparent canopy, and behind it sits a small astromech droid. The rear of the craft displays four large engine exhausts, suggesting high thrust capability. The overall design is angular and aggressive, with visible panel lines and weathering effects that give it a rugged, battle-worn appearance. The landing gear is not visible, indicating it may be retracted or integrated into the body.
description: A white, red, and gray starfighter with an X-shaped wing configuration, four engines, and a forward cockpit with a dome-shaped astromech droid behind it.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the symmetrical X-shaped wings with laser cannons at the tips.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, cockpit placement, and the stacked engine nacelles along the wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the four large engine exhausts and the full spread of the X-shaped wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the astromech droid and wing-mounted weaponry.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with four straight wings arranged in an X-shape, each wing featuring a cylindrical engine nacelle and a laser cannon at the tip; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Four cylindrical jet engines mounted at the midpoints of each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable and integrated into the fuselage and wings.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single seat, covered by a transparent canopy and positioned ahead of the astromech droid socket.
